bead.title: implement: TP-002 multi-project Playwright coverage (TC-010 through TC-013)
bead.description: TP-002 TC-010 (project registry and scoped routing), TC-011 (host+user state and node identity), TC-012 (host+user project isolation and concurrency), and TC-013 (execute-loop worker lifecycle) are all PLANNED with no Playwright coverage. TP-002 specifies a projects.spec.ts file at cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/projects.spec.ts that seeds multi-project fixtures via XDG_DATA_HOME override and POST /api/projects/register. TC-011 state persistence tests may be covered in Go (server_test.go) but TC-010/TC-012 isolation and TC-013 worker lifecycle tests need both Go and Playwright coverage per TP-002.
bead.acceptance: cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/projects.spec.ts exists covering TC-010 (registry, scoped routing, MCP) and TC-012 (isolation); Go tests in cli/internal/server/ cover TC-011 state persistence (restart, single-instance); workers_test.go covers TC-013 worker lifecycle (start, logs, stop, scope); bun run test:e2e passes with projects.spec.ts
